title: Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair kept rates steady, signaled no further hikes, emphasized economic strength, and hinted at potential future cuts
